extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny out-sprinted VAN AVERMAET Greg from a reduced peloton after CCC set pace to reel in late breakaway.
tactical_patterns: CCC team paced climb to thin peloton for NAESEN sprint, revealing team sprint-climb hybrid tactics on hilly stages.
Three-rider breakaway caught inside final kilometer despite crosswinds suggests critical gap threshold around 15-20 seconds with 1km remaining.
VAN AVERMAET launching first in reduced sprint indicates vulnerability when isolated without leadout on selective finishes.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: Won from reduced bunch after climb, confirming superior punch over pure sprinters on selective finales.
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: Second after opening sprint early suggests strong form but tactical error without leadout train support.
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: positive: CCC using climbing pace to setup his sprint demonstrates team commitment and selective stage versatility.
rider_signals.VAN HOOYDONCK Nathan: neutral: Survived in late breakaway until final kilometer, showing diesel engine suitability for long attacks.
rider_signals.LEVEAU Jérémy: negative: First dropped from breakaway on climb reveals insufficient climbing watts to survive selective cooperation groups.
